articles.title: Hindalco Industries likely to gain from high aluminium, copper prices
articles.summary: Business Standard reported that Hindalco Industries is expected to benefit from prevailing high aluminium and copper prices.

articles.title: Top bauxite producer Guinea to unveil export controls in June
articles.summary: Guinea, the world's largest bauxite producer, plans to unveil export controls in June 2026 aimed at stabilising bauxite prices amid global market volatility.
articles.novelis_angle: Guinea export controls would add a further supply constraint upstream of European smelters, putting upward structural pressure on P1020 availability and ECDP premiums independent of the current Middle East disruption.

articles.title: Global aluminum rally could draw record exports from China
articles.summary: China's daily aluminium output hit an all-time high of 129,000 tonnes in May 2026, with full-year exports tracking toward 7.2–7.5 million tonnes—potentially exceeding the 2024 record of 6.7 million tonnes—as the LME–Shanghai price premium reached its widest since March 2022.
articles.novelis_angle: Record Chinese aluminium exports would partially replenish global P1020 supply and cap further ECDP premium gains, easing upstream cost pressure for European FRP producers including Novelis.
